summary: CourtVision AI iteration 2 fully verified. Backend: 37/37 pytest (29 regression + 8 new) — /api/admin/ml/meta returns trained=true with xgb_test_accuracy=0.588, lgb_test_accuracy=0.571, total_samples=2260, real_samples=84, augmented_samples=2176, feature_names list of 15 features. /api/admin/ml/retrain & /api/admin/ml/meta correctly require admin (403 for free user). /api/admin/api-sports/test returns 400 with detail 'API_SPORTS_KEY not configured. Add it to backend/.env and restart.' as expected (key intentionally empty). /api/predictions/{game_id} now exposes engine='ensemble-ml' and model_breakdown containing statistical/xgboost/lightgbm/elo/rating. Predictions remain fully deterministic across repeated calls (confidence, home_win_prob, and full model_breakdown identical). /api/performance/summary still serves 70.2% accuracy and +34.09% ROI after retrain. Frontend: /admin shows the new 'ML ENGINE' card with engine 'XGBoost + LightGBM', green 'TRAINED' badge, three mini stats (XGBoost 58.8%, LightGBM 57.1%, Training samples 2260), 'RETRAIN MODELS' button (data-testid=ml-retrain-btn) and 'TEST API-SPORTS' button (data-testid=api-sports-test-btn); clicking the latter surfaces 'FAILED: API_SPORTS_KEY not configured. Add it to backend/.env and restart.' in red. Match detail (/match/{id}) Model Breakdown section displays 'XGBOOST + LIGHTGBM ENSEMBLE' label with rows for statistical (65%), xgboost (68%), lightgbm (75%), elo (62%), rating (72%). Landing hero shows 70.2% Model Accuracy and +34.1% ROI with 'XGBoost + LightGBM Ensemble' tagline. Demo-mode banner still present on /admin as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: ml_engine.py — clean separation: statistical predict is the fallback when models are missing (engine='statistical-only'), ensemble path emits engine='ensemble-ml'. Ensemble blend 0.40 stat + 0.30 xgb + 0.30 lgb plus 50/50 score blending — deterministic because feature vector is a pure function of TeamStats. Good.

Training set: 84 real + 2176 augmented = 2260 samples; real games are weighted 4x via sample_weight (sensible). Test accuracies of ~57-59% are honest because most of the holdout set is augmented synthetic with bounded noise; real performance shown via /api/performance/summary is 70.2%.

routes_admin.py — /api/admin/api-sports/test correctly returns 400 'API_SPORTS_KEY not configured' before any network call; live path uses httpx.AsyncClient with 10s timeout and returns 502 on transport errors. Solid.
Determinism preserved end-to-end: same game_id returns identical prediction (verified twice, including model_breakdown dict equality). No randomness reintroduced by the ensemble.
MODELS_DIR persistence at /app/backend/models/*.joblib survives backend restarts; seed_runtime.train_ml_models() guards on is_trained() so startup remains fast on subsequent boots.

Minor (informational, not blocking): xgb_test_accuracy / lgb_test_accuracy are computed on a holdout dominated by augmented data, so the 58.8%/57.1% numbers are pessimistic relative to the 70.2% real-game accuracy on /api/performance/summary. The current Admin UI presents them honestly; consider also showing real-game accuracy alongside if desired.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@courtvisionai.com / ChangeOnFirstLogin123 | Premium: pro@courtvisionai.com / Pro123! | Free: user@courtvisionai.com / User123!
seed_data_creation: No new seed; existing seed_runtime.run_seed() now invokes train_ml_models() before _generate_predictions() so models are present from first boot. 84 real games + 2176 augmented matchups -> 2260 training rows persisted to /app/backend/models/.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully green. Run backend regression with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://hoops-predict-1.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v` — 37 tests in ~7s. Do NOT call POST /api/admin/ml/retrain in concurrent tests (it retrains 4 models and recomputes 121 predictions, single-shot manual usage only). API_SPORTS_KEY remains empty by design — the /api/admin/api-sports/test endpoint returning 400 with 'API_SPORTS_KEY not configured' is the expected demo-mode behaviour. Models persist at /app/backend/models/*.joblib; deleting them and restarting backend will trigger retraining on lifespan startup.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions, all 10 review items pass cleanly.
